title: Create a new project library
description: Open Cadence from ~/Cadence. From the main Virtuoso window, navigate to File -> New -> Library to open the Library Manager. Enter the desired library name (e.g., ER_ASIC_Rev1_Tapeout), and select "Attach to an existing technology library." Attach the new library to the tsmcN65 technology library in the subsequent window.
